# Architecture

This directory contains design documents for major architectural decisions.

## Active documents

- [Dependency injection conventions](dependency-injection.md)
- [Caching strategy](caching.md)

## Conventions across all documents

When making a significant architectural change, add a new document here and reference it from the relevant module README. Don't update old docs in place if the decision changes — write a new one and link from the old one with "superseded by".
